CustomField.description: This is to help for a report that shows how many orders were updated by day. If it's new, then the number is more accurate
CustomField.formula:
DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) = DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate) &&
/*We are new if the date is the same and the hours are roughly 4 hours apart*/ value(fxHourUpdated__c) -value(fxHourCreated__c) <=4
CustomField.label: isNew
